testPlanDescription: Comprehensive functional tests for regular user pages, including login, logout, profile editing, and access to all public pages. Requires user authentication.
additionalInstructions: Tests regular user pages comprehensively. Requires TEST_USER_EMAIL and TEST_USER_PASSWORD environment variables. The first test (USER-001) handles login. Subsequent tests assume authenticated session until logout test (USER-017). Focuses on functional interactions including profile editing and saving.
notes: This configuration is for comprehensive functional tests covering login, logout, profile management, and public page access for regular users.
